name: Creamy Garlic Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the plain yogurt, low-fat Italian dressing, and grated Parmesan cheese.
2. Mince or crush the garlic clove finely.
3. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Makes one cup (16 tablespoons).
